tool.name: generate_nuclei_template
tool.description:
Generate a custom nuclei YAML template to test specific vulnerability patterns.
Use when you discover a vulnerability on one endpoint and want to systematically test ALL similar endpoints. The template can be saved and executed with nuclei.
Examples: - Found IDOR on /api/users/1 → generate template to test /api/users/{{id}} with different IDs - Found SQLi on search param → generate template testing all search endpoints - Found missing auth on /admin → generate template checking all admin paths
The generated YAML can be saved to a file and run with: nuclei -u TARGET -t /tmp/nuclei-custom/template-id.yaml

parameters.parameter: critical, high, medium, low, info (default: high)
HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
